title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: If you had more free time, how would you use it?
Do you like to keep up-to-date with world news?
Do you think you work well under pressure?
What do you like about the social networking sites you use?
What would be your ideal job?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Is there someone whose advice you really value?
What kind of music do you enjoy most?
Do you prefer spending time indoors or outdoors? Why?
